exam_price_notes: $230 exam fee paid to ASWB. Separate application fee may be required by state board.

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Pearson VUE test centers in the US and Canada

id_requirements: One valid government-issued photo ID with name and signature. Name must match ASWB Authorization to Test (ATT) exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials permitted. On-screen calculator provided. Scratch paper available at test center. No personal items in testing area.
renewal_options: License renewal requirements (CE hours, renewal period, fees) are set by each state licensing board, not by ASWB. Contact your state board for specific renewal requirements.

prerequisites.description: Master of Social Work (MSW) degree from a CSWE-accredited program; eligibility determined by state licensing board

retake_policy.notes: 90-day waiting period between exam attempts. Maximum 3 attempts per year. Full exam fee required for each retake. State board may impose additional restrictions.

domains.name: Human Development, Diversity, and Behavior in the Environment

official_study_resources.title: ASWB Exam Preparation Resources
official_study_resources.notes: Official practice tests, content outlines, and candidate handbook

aliases: aswb master s examination msw licensing
